# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a Single Page Application (SPA) built with React 18 and TypeScript. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with functional components and hooks
- **Routing**: React Router DOM with protected routes and authentication guards
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for global state
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with design system tokens and shadcn/ui component library
- **Backend Integration**: Supabase for authentication, database, and real-time features

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication Flow
- Uses Supabase Auth for user authentication
- Protected routes with automatic redirects
- Auth context provider managing session state
- Loading states during authentication checks

### Component Structure
- Layout components (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar) for consistent UI
- shadcn/ui components for standardized design system
- Custom components for business logic (BeudoxLogo, NavLink)
- Page components for route-level features

### Data Fetching
- TanStack Query for caching and synchronization
- Supabase client for database operations
- Optimistic updates and error handling

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders React app
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing and providers
- `src/index.css`: Global styles and Tailwind imports

### Layout Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and content area
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Collapsible sidebar with navigation sections
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with page titles

### UI Components
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Brand logo component with variants
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Enhanced NavLink with active state styling
- `src/components/ui/`: shadcn/ui component library (40+ components)

### Pages and Routing
- `src/pages/Login.tsx`: Authentication page
- `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`: Main dashboard (currently implemented)
- `src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx`: Password reset page
- `src/pages/NotFound.tsx`: 404 error page

### Hooks and Utilities
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Utility functions (cn for class merging)

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Database type definitions
- `supabase/config.toml`: Supabase project configuration
- `supabase/migrations/`: Database schema migrations

## Database Schema

The application uses Supabase (PostgreSQL) with the following key entities:
- Employees: User profiles and organizational data
- Attendance: Time tracking and presence records
- Leave: Vacation and absence management
- Payroll: Salary calculations and financial data
- Projects: Project management and assignments

## Configuration Files

- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js`: Linting rules
- `playwright.config.ts`: E2E testing configuration
- `vitest.config.ts`: Unit testing configuration

## Development Workflow

1. **Local Development**: `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server
2. **Building**: `npm run build` creates production bundle
3. **Testing**: `npm run test` runs unit tests, Playwright for E2E
4. **Linting**: `npm run lint` checks code quality
5. **Preview**: `npm run preview` serves production build locally

## Environment Variables

- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: Supabase project URL
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`: Public Supabase API key
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID`: Supabase project identifier

## Business Logic Areas

### HR Management Features
- Employee lifecycle management
- Attendance and time tracking
- Leave request processing
- Payroll calculation and disbursement
- Performance evaluations
- HR policy management

### Financial Management
- Salary processing
- Loan management
- Expense tracking
- Financial reporting

### System Administration
- User role management
- Notification system
- System configuration
- Audit logging

## Current Implementation Status

- ✅ Authentication system
- ✅ Basic layout and navigation
- ✅ Dashboard page
- 🚧 Employee management (UI components exist, backend integration pending)
- 🚧 Attendance tracking
- 🚧 Payroll system
- 🚧 Other HR modules

## Code Quality Standards

- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code consistency
- Prettier for code formatting
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing
- Component composition over inheritance
- Custom hooks for reusable logic
- Environment-based configuration
